<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/gateways/connect"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



根据网关连接信息执行网关入网

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[]}
>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["connectedGateways"],"properties":{"connectedGateways":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["ip","port","deviceToken","deviceId"],"properties":{"ip":{"type":"string","description":"网关 IP"},"port":{"type":"integer","description":"网关端口号","example":8088},"deviceToken":{"type":"string","description":"网关入网验证 token（即设备 userId）"},"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"网关设备 ID"},"deviceName":{"type":"string","description":"设备名称"}},"title":"GatewayConnectItem"}}},"title":"GatewayConnectRequest"},"examples":{"connectGateway":{"value":{"connectedGateways":[{"ip":"192.168.1.10","port":8088,"deviceToken":"user-id-token","deviceId":"gateway-001","deviceName":"Living room gateway"}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
